docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-05-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-20-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, JULIANA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY LAI, JULIANA AS TO DEFENDANT LAI, FUNG LAN YU, YING KI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
